entry.title: Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots

link.title: Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots

entry.content:
This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook.

The formula $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$ is Pythagoras’ theorem.

Block math example:

\[\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1\]

Here’s a sample plot:

You can also add Python code:

def sum(a,b):
    return a + b
    
print(sum(2, 3))

Pretty cool right?!

⬅ Back to Home
entry.summary: This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook. The formula $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$ is Pythagoras’ theorem. Block math example: \[\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1\] Here’s a sample plot: You can also add Python code: def sum(a,b): return a + b print(sum(2, 3)) Pretty cool right?! ⬅ Back to Home
